name: Laceration Repair — Face, Sutures (Simple)

diagnoses.display: Laceration without foreign body of other part of head, initial encounter

otherSuppliesUsed: 5-0 or 6-0 nylon, lidocaine 1% w/o epi, sterile gloves
otherPostInstructions: Keep clean and dry 24h; suture removal in 5 days; return for redness, drainage, or fever
